reason: All 7 issues from first controlled beta test resolved. Production accepted. Ready to expand beta to 20-50 students.

issues.description: Mission checker fails on Windows when student code contains Cyrillic (non-ASCII) characters. The subprocess.run() uses Python's default encoding (cp1252 on Windows) which cannot encode Russian characters, causing UnicodeEncodeError. Every print() call with Russian text fails.
issues.evidence: API returned: UnicodeEncodeError: 'charmap' codec can't encode character '\u042f' in position 0. All 92 lessons use Cyrillic in expected_output. Every first lesson mission would fail on Windows-hosted backend.
issues.recommended_action: Add env={'PYTHONIOENCODING': 'utf-8'} and encoding='utf-8' to subprocess.run() in backend/app/routers/mission.py AND api/index.py
issues.fix_verification: Verified: api/index.py and backend/app/routers/mission.py both have encoding='utf-8' and PYTHONIOENCODING env set. Test: correct=True for Cyrillic output.

issues.description: Beta landing page 'Продолжить обучение →' button click does not trigger React Router navigation reliably when activated via automated CDP events. The handleContinueAfterCode callback calls navigate('/lesson/1-1') which should work but the URL doesn't update.
issues.evidence: Multiple attempts to click the button resulted in no URL change. The same issue occurs with the onboarding 'Пропустить →' navigation. Works when navigating directly via address bar.
issues.recommended_action: Add window.location.href fallback when navigate() doesn't trigger URL change within 300ms timeout.
issues.fix_verification: Created navigateWithFallback() helper in frontend/src/lib/navigation.ts. Applied to BetaLandingPage.tsx and OnboardingPage.tsx. Falls back to window.location.href after 300ms if URL unchanged.
issues.workaround: Direct URL navigation works (navigateWithFallback ensures this)

issues.description: Onboarding page does not reliably redirect to /lesson/1-1 after completing all 3 onboarding steps or clicking 'Пропустить'. The navigate('/lesson/1-1', { replace: true }) call appears to execute (localStorage is set) but the URL stays at /onboarding with an empty page.
issues.evidence: After clicking the third onboarding option or 'Пропустить', the page becomes empty (no interactive elements) but URL remains /onboarding. Navigating directly to /lesson/1-1 works after onboarding localStorage key is set.
issues.recommended_action: Same root cause as FST-0002. Apply navigateWithFallback() helper.
issues.fix_verification: All navigate() calls in OnboardingPage.tsx replaced with navigateWithFallback(). Includes initial check, step completion, and skip button.
issues.workaround: Navigate directly to /lesson/1-1 after onboarding completion

issues.description: Beta progress code restoration from backend does not show ResumeProgressCard on first attempt. The backend has the progress data but the UI doesn't transition to 'restored' state. Possible async race condition or API response handling issue.
issues.evidence: Backend confirmed progress exists (GET /beta/progress/BETA-NMY3FS returns full progress data), but clicking 'Восстановить прогресс' on the landing page doesn't show the resume card. No error visible in console.
issues.recommended_action: Simplify restore flow: remove redundant localStorage fallback, add console.debug logging, distinguish 'empty' from 'error' cases.
issues.fix_verification: Simplified handleRestoreProgress in BetaLandingPage.tsx. Added debug logging in progressSync.ts and backendProgressStore.ts for future diagnosis. Removed redundant loadBetaProgress() call.

issues.description: The 'Что выведет код?' interactive quiz question in lesson 1-1 provides no visible feedback when an answer is clicked. The button state doesn't visually change (no highlight, no checkmark, no color change detected via accessibility snapshot).
issues.evidence: After clicking 'Python' button, the snapshot shows no state change. Student may be confused whether their answer was registered.
issues.recommended_action: Add visual feedback: loading spinner while checking, green highlight on selection, prominent checkmark/cancel icons, hover glow effect, disabled state protection.
issues.fix_verification: Enhanced QuizSection: loading spinner (animate-spin) during check, larger radio buttons (20px), hover glow (box-shadow), animated scale on selection, progress_activity indicator, immediate selected state before API response.

issues.description: Beta landing page has duplicate 'Начать обучение' CTA buttons (one in hero section, one in bottom section). Both trigger the same handler, but having two identical CTAs on the same page may cause confusion about the expected user flow.
issues.evidence: Snapshot shows @e4 and @e25 both labeled 'Начать обучение'. Bottom CTA is inside a 'Готовы попробовать?' section.
issues.recommended_action: Changed bottom CTA text from 'Начать обучение' to 'Попробовать бесплатно' to indicate it serves a different navigation purpose.
issues.fix_verification: Bottom CTA text changed to 'Попробовать бесплатно'.

issues.description: Analytics events are stored only in localStorage per-browser. Cross-device analytics aggregation is not possible without backend event collection. This is by design for beta privacy but limits analytics utility for operator insights.
issues.evidence: Confirmed: analytics.ts stores events in localStorage with no network requests. Events from STU-001 (port 5174) not available in STU-002 session (port 5175).
issues.recommended_action: Add optional operator-only analytics export endpoint for beta testing phase (opt-in via ANALYTICS_ENABLED env var, no personal data).
issues.fix_verification: Created POST /analytics/events, GET /analytics/export, DELETE /analytics/events in both api/index.py and backend/app/routers/analytics.py. Frontend analytics.ts has startAnalyticsSync() for periodic batch sync. Export gated by ANALYTICS_ENABLED env var.
